title: Pet Care Assistant (Rabbit Boarding & Medical Care Support)
description:
Part-Time Pet Care Assistant (Rabbits & Small Animals)

About the Role

This role is primarily focused on cleaning and hygiene (approximately 90%). We are looking for a compassionate animal lover with a strong eye for detail who understands that cleanliness is critical to animal health, recovery, and comfort.

We are seeking someone who is committed, dependable, and willing to grow with the team, with the opportunity to progress into a full-time position over time.

Grooming and medical handling will be guided and taught to suitable candidates once trust, consistency, and care standards are demonstrated.

Key Responsibilities

Daily Cleaning & Housekeeping (Main Focus):

  • Maintain high hygiene standards by cleaning suites, litter boxes, food bowls, floors, and common areas throughout the day

  • Ensure all animal areas remain clean, dry, sanitary, and comfortable

  • Follow strict cleaning protocols, especially for medical or post-operative cases

Daily Care Support:

  • Assist with feeding, basic handling, and daily monitoring of rabbits and small animals

Medication & Supplement Support:

  • Support caregivers in administering supplements or medications

  • Record simple observations such as appetite, stool output, and behaviour

Medical & Post-Operative Support:

  • Assist with routine checks

  • Learn how we manage medical, recovery, and higher-risk cases

Enrichment & Environment:

  • Help maintain a calm, safe, and low-stress environment for sensitive animals

Customer Support:

  • Assist during check-ins, check-outs, and basic updates when required

Requirements

  • Genuine love and patience for rabbits and small animals

  • Comfortable with daily cleaning, sanitation tasks, and physical work

  • Able to commit at least 3 days per week: Tuesday, Thursday & Saturday, for 4–5 hours per shift starting from 8:00am

  • Detail-oriented and able to follow care and hygiene protocols

  • Responsible, punctual, and consistent

  • Good communication skills and able to work well in a team

  • Interested in long-term growth and eventually transitioning into a full-time role

Benefits

  • Real hands-on experience in rabbit husbandry and medical/post-operative care

  • Guided training in rabbit grooming and medical handling for suitable candidates
    (nail trimming, brushing, hygiene care, basic handling)

  • Mentorship from experienced caregivers with vet-nursing backgrounds

  • Exposure to 24/7 medical-level boarding operations

  • Opportunity for long-term growth and full-time conversion

Application Process

Shortlisted candidates will be invited for an unpaid trial shift from 8:30am – 12:30pm on a selected date.
Please arrive punctually, dressed in neat and comfortable attire suitable for cleaning and animal handling.
